# Raki

> Practice-management software for chartered accountant (CA) firms in India: client
> management, GST/TDS/ITR filing and deadline tracking, document uploads with AI-assisted
> data extraction, and a subscription billing plan structure.

Raki is a preparation and record-keeping tool for a CA firm's own practice - it does not
file anything with a government portal on a firm's behalf. Any AI-extracted document data
must be reviewed and confirmed by the firm before it is used elsewhere in the app.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): overview of the product, features, and pricing
- [Pricing](/#pricing): current subscription plans and founding-member pricing
- [How it works](/#how-it-works): the client -> filing -> document workflow
- [Sign up](/signup): start a free trial
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Contact](/contact)
